content.text:
<user_query>
Find and read the full Playwright test file that contains the test "creates a campaign from the homepage modal and navigates to its detail page without client errors". It should be in apps/org-next/tests/. Read the entire test file and return its full contents and file path.
</user_query>

input.pattern: creates a campaign from the homepage modal and navigates to its detail page without client errors
